name: Freak
description: Digital manifold stereo filter modelling 13+ Vult analog filters plus waveshapers and distortions across 45+ configurations. Stereo or Duo (independent mono) modes, built-in VCAs, drive, and A/B CV cross-modulation routing.

controls.name: Cutoff
controls.description: Primary filter frequency. Full CCW closed, full CW open. 1V/Oct tracking via cutoff CV with attenuverter.

controls.name: Resonance
controls.description: Boosts frequencies near cutoff. Most models self-oscillate; character depends on selected filter (Polivoks bite, Moog warmth, Steiner scream).

controls.name: Drive
controls.description: Input saturation stage ahead of the filter. Subtle pinch of warmth at low settings to full saturation at max.

controls.name: Cutoff Attenuverter
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for cutoff CV input. Centre is zero.

controls.name: Resonance Attenuverter
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for resonance CV input.

controls.name: Drive Attenuverter
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for drive CV input.

controls.name: Filter Selector
controls.description: Chooses one of the modelled filters: Vortex, Unstabile, Lateralus, Tangents (YU/MS/XX), Stabile, Ferox, Nurage, Rescomb, Vorg, Boomstick, Debriatus, Phonok, and distortions/waveshapers.

controls.name: Mode Selector
controls.description: Selects filter mode for the current model: LP/BP/HP/Notch variants, or 6/12/18/24dB slopes on Lateralus.
controls.detail: Model-dependent · LP, BP, HP, Notch, multi-slope

controls.name: Mod Route
controls.description: Routes A/B CV inputs between channels. Combined: A+B to both. Individual: A→L, B→R. Inverse: A-B→L, B-A→R.

controls.name: Settings Menu
controls.description: Access extra modes: Stereo vs Duo, VCA modes (Duplex/Nitrous/Wolv), Nopskate octaver, Flame distortion variants, screensaver.

inputs.name: IN L
inputs.description: Stereo left input (or channel A input in Duo mode).

inputs.name: IN R
inputs.description: Stereo right input (or channel B input in Duo mode).

inputs.name: CUTOFF CV
inputs.description: Filter cutoff CV. 1V/Oct-trackable with attenuverter centred.

inputs.name: A CV
inputs.description: CV input A. Routed per Mod Route selector in Duo mode; in Stereo, maps to a menu-assigned parameter.

inputs.name: B CV
inputs.description: CV input B. Routed per Mod Route selector.

outputs.name: OUT L
outputs.description: Stereo left output (or channel A output in Duo mode).

outputs.name: OUT R
outputs.description: Stereo right output (or channel B output in Duo mode).

behaviors.name: 13+ filter models
behaviors.description: Each model emulates a classic circuit: Vortex (Polivoks), Lateralus (Moog ladder, 6/12/18/24dB), Tangents (Steiner-Parker, three variants), Stabile (state-variable), Ferox (CMOS), Nurage (Buchla LPG), Vorg (MS-20), Rescomb (resonant comb), Boomstick (Sallen-Key), Debriatus (waveshaper chain), Unstabile (circuit-bent SVF), plus Phonok.

behaviors.name: Stereo vs Duo mode
behaviors.description: Stereo: L/R pair processed by the same filter settings (true stereo). Duo: two independent mono filters with shared model but separate cutoff/CV per channel. Duo enables L and R as independent voices or parallel/series processing.

behaviors.name: A/B cross-modulation routing
behaviors.trigger: Mod Route selector in Duo mode
behaviors.description: Individual: A modulates left only, B modulates right only. Inverse: routes A-B to left and B-A to right, creating opposing motion between channels — wide phasey stereo from a single LFO pair.

behaviors.name: Self-oscillation across models
behaviors.trigger: Resonance near max on most models
behaviors.description: Most filter models self-oscillate with distinct character: Lateralus pure sine, Vortex aggressive Polivoks tone, Tangents throaty Steiner scream, Ferox gritty CMOS peak. Self-oscillating models track 1V/Oct well — plays as a filter-voice oscillator.

behaviors.name: Built-in VCAs
behaviors.description: Internal VCAs on L/R outputs controllable via A/B CV or dedicated mapping. Duplex/Nitrous/Wolv are distinct VCA response curves. Turns Freak into a full voice stage — no external VCA needed.

behaviors.name: Drive as pre-filter saturation
behaviors.description: Drive saturates the signal before the filter stage, not after. Harmonics introduced by drive are then filtered by cutoff/resonance — different character from post-filter distortion. Low settings warm the signal; max settings behave like a distortion pedal into the filter.

behaviors.name: Debriatus waveshaper chain
behaviors.description: Not a traditional filter — two waveshaper chains in series that destroy input harmonic content. Pair with cutoff sweep for evolving noise textures rather than classic filtering.

behaviors.name: Rescomb resonant comb
behaviors.description: Two comb-filter modes with resonance feedback. Tunable delay lines — plays Karplus-Strong-like plucks when fed with noise bursts and driven at audio-rate cutoff CV.

patchIdeas.name: Karplus pluck via Rescomb
patchIdeas.patch: Noise burst (AD × noise) → IN L · Filter: Rescomb · V/Oct sequence → CUTOFF CV · each burst rings the comb at the sequenced pitch · plucky string voice
patchIdeas.diagram:
Freak:
* Filter: Rescomb
* Resonance: ~2 o'clock

Noise:

AD:

Gate:

Sequencer:

- Gate (Out) g> AD (Trig)
- AD (Out) >> Noise (VCA CV)
- Noise (Out) -> Freak (IN L)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Freak (CUTOFF CV)
- Freak (OUT L) -> Output (In L)

patchIdeas.name: Inverse stereo wobble
patchIdeas.patch: Pad stereo → IN L/R · Mode: Duo · Mod Route: Inverse · single LFO → A · cutoff opens on L as it closes on R · opposing stereo motion
patchIdeas.diagram:
Freak:
* Mode: Duo
* Mod Route: Inverse
* Filter: Vortex

LFO:

Pad:

- Pad (Out L) -> Freak (IN L)
- Pad (Out R) -> Freak (IN R)
- LFO (Out) >> Freak (A CV) // A-B to L · B-A to R
- Freak (OUT L) -> Output (In L)
- Freak (OUT R) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Polivoks scream
patchIdeas.patch: VCO saw → IN L · Filter: Vortex · Mode: LP · Resonance high · Drive moderate · aggressive Polivoks-style acid squelch · sequencer → CUTOFF CV with attenuverter
patchIdeas.diagram:
Freak:
* Filter: Vortex
* Mode: LP
* Resonance: ~3 o'clock
* Drive: ~1 o'clock

VCO:

Sequencer:

- VCO (Out) -> Freak (IN L)
- Sequencer (CV) >> Freak (CUTOFF CV)
- Freak (OUT L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Self-oscillating sine voice
patchIdeas.patch: No input · Filter: Lateralus 24dB · Resonance max · Drive 0 · V/Oct sequence → CUTOFF CV (centred attenuverter) · Freak as a clean sine oscillator that tracks 1V/Oct
patchIdeas.diagram:
Freak:
* Filter: Lateralus
* Mode: LP 24dB
* Resonance: max
* Drive: 0

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Freak (CUTOFF CV)
- Freak (OUT L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Nurage Buchla LPG
patchIdeas.patch: VCO → IN L · Filter: Nurage · LPG mode · trigger → via envelope → A CV (VCA-mapped) · plucky low-pass-gate bongo with Buchla character
patchIdeas.diagram:
Freak:
* Filter: Nurage
* VCA mode: Duplex (A→VCA)

VCO:

Env:

Gate:

- VCO (Out) -> Freak (IN L)
- Gate (Out) g> Env (Trig)
- Env (Out) >> Freak (A CV) // opens internal VCA
- Freak (OUT L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Parallel series Duo
patchIdeas.patch: Source → IN L · Freak Duo · OUT L → IN R (via external cable) · two stages of the same model in series · drive stacking for aggressive saturation
patchIdeas.diagram:
Freak:
* Mode: Duo
* Filter: Tangents-XX
* Mod Route: Individual

VCO:

- VCO (Out) -> Freak (IN L)
- Freak (OUT L) -> Freak (IN R) // series feedback
- Freak (OUT R) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Debriatus destroyer
patchIdeas.patch: Clean synth line → IN L · Filter: Debriatus · Drive high · cutoff sweep from LFO · waveshaper chain annihilates the signal into noise-adjacent textures
patchIdeas.diagram:
Freak:
* Filter: Debriatus
* Drive: ~3 o'clock

Synth:

LFO:

- Synth (Out) -> Freak (IN L)
- LFO (Out) >> Freak (CUTOFF CV)
- Freak (OUT L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Stereo Tangens scream
patchIdeas.patch: Drone pad stereo → IN L/R · Filter: Tangents-MS · Mode: BP · Resonance near self-osc · Stereo mode · drone screams with Steiner-Parker bite across both channels
patchIdeas.diagram:
Freak:
* Filter: Tangents-MS
* Mode: BP
* Mode: Stereo
* Resonance: ~3 o'clock

Drone:

- Drone (Out L) -> Freak (IN L)
- Drone (Out R) -> Freak (IN R)
- Freak (OUT L) -> Output (In L)
- Freak (OUT R) -> Output (In R)
